title: Prophetess (disambiguation)
content:
'''Prophetess''' could refer to three different individuals:
*[[Merili]], a [[Prophets of the Dark Side|Prophetess of the Dark Side]]
*[[Valara Saar]], a skilled [[The Force/Legends|Force]] user and teacher of [[Force Adept]]s on [[Yashuvhu/Legends|Yashuvhu]], who was given the title '''Prophetess''' by her [[Yashuvhi|people]]
*[[Sariss]], a [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]] who assumed the title '''Prophetess''' during a spying mission on [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]

==See also==
*[[Prophet (disambiguation)]]
